author: doll-agent
content: Added sample_y(x, n_samples, random_state) to FittedGaussianProcessRegressor. Implementation: computes K** = kernel.compute(x,x), reuses the existing l_factor to forward-substitute V from K*^T, builds K_post = K** - V^T V with a 1e-10 jitter on the diagonal, Choleskys K_post → L_post, then for each draw samples z ~ N(0,I) via rand_distr StandardNormal and returns mean + L_post @ z. Uses Xoshiro256Plus from rand_xoshiro for reproducible draws when random_state is Some. Returns shape (n_query, n_samples). All 222 tests pass.
